name: worldbook-backup-helper
description: SillyTavern worldbook workbench for editing, versioning, diffing, restoring, and exporting worldbooks.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check extension/index.js && node --check packages/core/index.js && node --check packages/vscode-extension/extension.js && node --check packages/webview-ui/main.js
